name: Senkon Logistics Co., Ltd.
summary: Senkon Logistics Co., Ltd. provides various logistics services in Japan. The company offers third party logistics services; general cargo, precision mechanical equipment, and vehicle transport services; and industrial waste collection and transportation services, as well as owns warehouses, including location management, low-temperature, agricultural tool, tire, electronic appliance, general, electronic component, open-air yard, and information warehouses, as well as trunk room facilities. It also provides document and personal data management services; moving services, including packing/unpacking, piano transportation, room cleaning, computer and vehicle transportation, disposal collection, plant machinery transportation, and AC installation/de-installation services; and international intermodal logistics services through land, sea, and air transportation. Senkon Logistics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Sendai, Japan.
